title: Beast Language
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
'''Beast Language''' was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] ability that allowed a user to speak with one type of creature in a language that it could understand, allowing both the handler and the animal to communicate and exchange information. This was an ability that wasn't normally found among many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. It could be used to communicate with creatures that did not normally communicate, such as microbes, through telepathic like language.

{{Language-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]]
